description_long: This ornate sconce features a classic chandelier design with a central stem from which multiple curved arms radiate outward, each supporting a lampshade. The arms are symmetrically arranged and adorned with decorative scrollwork, giving the fixture an elegant and traditional appearance. Each arm ends in a bulb socket covered by a conical lampshade, likely made of fabric or frosted glass. The central body is rounded and robust, with additional ornamental elements such as finials and small spherical accents. The fixture is suspended from a chain and ceiling mount, indicating it is designed to hang from above. The overall finish appears to be a uniform, light color, enhancing its refined and timeless aesthetic.
description: A classic chandelier-style sconce with multiple curved arms, each holding a conical lampshade, suspended from a ceiling mount with ornate scrollwork and decorative accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical arrangement of arms and lampshades, with the central stem and decorative scrollwork clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the arms and the spacing between the lampshades, highlighting the fixture's three-dimensional structure.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, but with less detail visible on the central decorative elements due to perspective.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the curvature of the arms and the alignment of the lampshades.
attribute_fixture_design: Traditional and ornate, this fixture features classic scrollwork and symmetrical arms, evoking a vintage or antique chandelier style.
